appDesc.message: Arc-style tab butler: no duplicate tabs, stale tabs auto-archived (undoable), tabs grouped by site or by AI topic.

notifBatchMsg.message: $1 tabs were saved to the archive and closed. Click to open the archive.

notifBreakerMsg.message: Too many automatic actions in a short time - automation is paused for 10 minutes. Manual actions still work.

pausedNote.message: Automation is paused (circuit breaker). It resumes on its own.

warmingNote.message: Warming up - automation starts once the session settles.

optDedupAutoHint.message: Opening a page you already have switches to the existing tab instead.

optArchiveAfterHint.message: Saved to the archive, then closed. Pinned, active, playing and allowlisted tabs are never touched.

optArchiveNotify.message: Notify with Undo after each auto-archive

optArchiveForeign.message: Also archive inside your own tab groups

optArchiveForeignHint.message: When off, groups you made by hand are treated as curated and skipped.

optDiscardHint.message: A tab halfway to the archive threshold is unloaded from memory but keeps its place in the tab strip; clicking it reloads the page. Saves RAM before archiving happens.

optAllowlistHint.message: One domain per line. Calls and meetings are seeded - the tabs API cannot see camera or microphone use.

optSmartEngineHint.message: Adds a "Smart Organize" that clusters tabs by meaning, not just by site.

smartStatusReady.message: Ready. Everything runs on this device - titles never leave your browser.

smartStatusDownloadable.message: Chrome will download the model once (about 2-4 GB). Only starts when you click.

smartStatusUnavailable.message: Not available on this device (needs Chrome 138+, 22 GB free disk and 16 GB RAM or a 4 GB GPU). Use an API key or site grouping instead.

optByokPrivacy.message: The key is stored only on this device. In this mode tab titles and domains are sent to the provider you chose, on your key. Access to the provider's domain is requested on save.

byokBadUrl.message: Enter a valid endpoint URL first.

byokPermDenied.message: Access to the provider was not granted.

optDiagCopied.message: Copied - paste it into your report. URLs only, no page content.

archiveEmpty.message: The archive is empty. Stale tabs will land here instead of being lost.

archiveTtlNote.message: Entries older than $1 are removed automatically.

groupsDragHint.message: Click - jump to the group. Drag to reorder within its window.

smartManagedNote.message: The model is downloaded and managed by Chrome itself. To remove it later, open

byokNoKey.message: No API key yet - smart grouping is inactive until you enter one.

optGroupsOnTopHint.message: On Organize and when a new group is born, groups line up right after the pinned tabs; loose tabs follow.

optSmartOtherHint.message: Tabs that fit no topic land in one catch-all group, always at the very end.

optSmartRegroup.message: Let Smart Organize rebuild automatic groups

optSmartRegroupHint.message: Site groups this extension made get re-clustered by topic. Groups you made by hand are never touched.

optAutoGroupHint.message: Gentle: only new tabs are grouped, existing tabs are never re-shuffled. By site: a group per site, born at the second tab. By topic: AI picks a matching topic group for each new tab.

optAutoGroupNeedsAi.message: Topic mode needs an AI engine - pick one in Smart grouping below. Until then new tabs group by site.

optSortGroupsHint.message: How TrueTabs groups line up in the strip. A-Z, recent and oldest apply once, when you click Organize. Live: the group you are using rises to the front after a 3-second dwell.

optSortTabsHint.message: Order inside each TrueTabs group and among loose tabs. A-Z, recent and oldest apply once, on Organize. Live: the tab you are using moves to the front of its group after a 3-second dwell.

optCustomHint.message: Your named groups with routing rules: list the sites that always belong there, describe the topic for the AI - or both. Rules run before any automatic grouping; two tabs pulled out by hand retire a rule for the session.

customHintPh.message: AI rule (optional): e.g. anything about GPU prices

customTooBig.message: Too much for sync storage - shorten the domain lists or hints.

engineDownBody.message: Live state can't load right now. If TrueTabs was just updated, reload it on chrome://extensions and reopen this page. Your tabs and archive are safe.
